package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Assam Retreat — Wild Horizon: Guwahati • Kaziranga • Brahmaputra River Cruise

highlights.text: Serial code AS-009 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-LUX-AS009-2026
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Luxury Assam Retreat
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park • Absolute Luxury River Cruise
Ideal for: Discerning Families, High-End Wildlife Enthusiasts, Experiential Travelers
Best season: November to April (Optimal Wildlife Sightings)
Starting price: INR 1,24,500/- Per Guest (On Bespoke Basis)
Vehicle: Ultra-Premium SUV (Mercedes-Benz GLS or Toyota Vellfire) | Meal Plan: Fully Inclusive Royal Assamese Gastronomy
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ Guwahati Riverside (2N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private champagne high tea on authentic heritage colonial plantation cottage grounds.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Every detail reviewed for complete privacy, comfort, and exceptional service.
Personalized Assistance: 24/7 on-ground luxury manager for adjustments and special requests.
Shopping: Golden Muga silk, bespoke tea collections, bamboo decor and rhino wood carvings.
Important Notes: Safaris seasonal; book 60-90 days ahead; neutral safari clothing; AC paused during forest drives.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Assam Retreat — Wild Horizon: Guwahati • Kaziranga • Brahmaputra River Cruise
itinerary.tagline: Luxury Assam Retreat • Kaziranga • Brahmaputra Cruise • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Extraordinary journey blending boutique wildlife lodges, private charters, and the realm of the Great Indian One-Horned Rhinoceros.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nGuwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3 Luxury Nights) ➔ Guwahati Premium Riverside (2 Nights) with private safaris, executive airport clearance, and heritage tea high-tea.

WHY CHOOSE THE LUXURY ASSAM RETREAT?\nPrivate safaris, Brahmaputra serenity with Ganges dolphins, colonial tea plantations, and premium handpicked hotels across top Assam sightseeing.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-009 | Luxury Assam Retreat Kaziranga Cruise | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Assam retreat (AS-009 / TG-LUX-AS009-2026): private safaris, heritage tea estate, Brahmaputra charter, Kamakhya VIP, 4-tier luxury.

highlights.text: Private escort to Kaziranga ultra-luxury lodge Day 01
Central and Western Range private safaris with senior naturalist Day 02
Heritage tea estate immersion with champagne high tea Day 03
Exclusive private Brahmaputra sunset charter Day 04
VIP Kamakhya Shrine and golden Muga silk heritage Day 05

days.title: GUWAHATI ARRIVAL | PRIVATE ESCORT TO KAZIRANGA WILDLIFE SANCTUARY
days.description: TRAGUIN luxury concierge at premium arrivals lounge. Magnificent scenic drive through tea estates to ultra-luxury Kaziranga jungle lodge with welcome cocktail and folk musicians.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic foothills drive, private tea estate entry.
Evening Experience: Private tribal dance performance and welcome reception.
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Lodge in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Curated Welcome Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA NATIONAL PARK | DAWN SAFARI & EVENING JEEP TRACKING
days.description: Early morning private Central Range safari with senior naturalist. Afternoon pool relaxation then Western Range golden-hour tracking expedition.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Central & Western Range private safaris.
Optional Activities: Therapeutic wellness treatment at the luxury lodge spa.
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Lodge in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: All Inclusive Gourmet Plan.

days.title: HERITAGE TEA ESTATE IMMERSION | CHIEFS & CHAMPAGNE HIGH TEA
days.description: Privately owned colonial plantation with estate manager walk, orthodox tea-tasting masterclass with champagne on heritage bungalow verandah, and bonfire dinner under stars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Colonial Tea Factory & Heritage Bungalow Grounds.
Local Experience: Premium Orthodox tea-tasting masterclass with a master blender.
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Lodge in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Estate Lunch & Al-Fresco Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | EXCLUSIVE PRIVATE BRAHMAPUTRA SUNSET CHARTER
days.description: Return to ultra-premium Guwahati hotel then exclusive charter boat with local delicacies, cocktails, and crimson sunset behind Nilachal Hills.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Silk-weaving route stop, Private River Charter.
Evening Experience: Live soothing instrumental music on board.
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & On-board Dining Experience.

days.title: GUWAHATI CULTURE | VIP SHRINE ACCESS & GOLDEN SILK HERITAGE
days.description: Fast-track VIP Kamakhya Temple access, optional Muga silk artisan workshop, and intimate fine-dining farewell dinner with refined regional cuisine.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kamakhya Temple (VIP Entry), Silk Heritage Center.
Local Experience: Curated shopping tour of luxury textile collections.
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Premium Farewell Dinner.

days.title: DEPARTURE | JOURNEY HOME WITH CHERISHED MEMORIES
days.description: Gourmet breakfast on riverview terraces before seamless luxury SUV transfer to Guwahati International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Airport Terminal Transit.
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast.

hotels.name: Infinity Resorts / Borgos Resort | Kiranshree Grand Luxury Rooms
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Infinity Resorts / Borgos Resort (Kaziranga, 3N) | Kiranshree Grand (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Diphlu River Lodge (Standard Cottage) | Novotel Guwahati (Executive Suite)
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Diphlu River Lodge Standard Cottage (Kaziranga, 3N) | Novotel Guwahati Executive Suite (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Diphlu River Lodge (Luxury River Suite) | Radisson Blu (Executive Panorama View)
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Diphlu River Lodge Luxury River Suite (Kaziranga, 3N) | Radisson Blu Executive Panorama (Guwahati, 2N) | Full Inclusive Board (APAI)

hotels.name: The Ultimate Travelling Camp (TUTC) / Taj Safari | Vivanta Guwahati (Presidential Suite)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: TUTC / Taj Safari (Kaziranga, 3N) | Vivanta Guwahati Presidential Suite (Guwahati, 2N) | Bespoke Elite Dining Plan

inclusions.text: Premium Accommodations: Five nights at top-tier luxury hotels and safari lodges on a twin/triple-share basis.
Luxury Fleet Transport: Full tour transfers using Mercedes-Benz GLS or Toyota Vellfire SUV, covering all tolls, fuel, and driver fees.
Bespoke Meal Plan: Daily multi-course breakfasts, custom lunches, and specialty dinners as detailed.
TRAGUIN Support & Amenities: Personalized welcome gifts, premium Assamese Orthodox tea sets, and unlimited bottled spring water.
Exclusive Experiences: Private sunset charter cruise on the Brahmaputra River and expedited VIP entry at Kamakhya Temple.
Expert Logistics: Accompanied by certified expert naturalists during private national park safaris.
Flights / Rail: Domestic or international airfares to and from Guwahati.
Personal Incidental Charges: Laundry, premium phone services, or extended minibar purchases.
Optional Excursions: Additional activities or private purchases not specified in the main itinerary.
Insurance Coverage: Personal travel, medical, or baggage loss insurance policies.
Unforeseen Circumstances: Extra costs resulting from flight disruptions, weather delays, or structural road changes.
